risk_title: Delayed Woreda Selection in Conflict and Drought-Affected Areas
risk_summary: Selection of 23 target woredas (10 conflict-affected, 10 drought-affected, 3 refugee-hosting) remains pending finalization, blocking implementation activities in FCV-affected areas and delaying needs assessment completion.
evidence_quote: Identification of project woredas affected by conflict, drought and high levels of refugees needs to be expedited to commence project implementation activities... MoF management's decision and guidance is critical to finalize the selection. This decision is urgent for the needs assessment and for finalizing the Operation's AWPB for FY2024/25.

risk_title: Incomplete Environmental and Social Risk Management in Conflict-Affected Regions
risk_summary: Critical E&S instruments including Security Risk Assessment, Security Management Plan, and Underserved Communities Planning Framework remain unfinalized, preventing implementation in conflict, drought, and refugee-affected areas.
evidence_quote: The Mission team is concerned about the capacity gap in E&S management as well as the delay in finalizing the ESMF, SEA/SH Prevention and Response Action Plan as well as the Underserved Communities Planning Framework... the delay in finalizing the ESMF, SEA/SH Prevention and Response Action Plan as well as the Underserved Communities Planning Framework.

risk_title: Coordination Gaps Between Government and Development Actors in FCV Regions
risk_summary: Lack of clarity and communication regarding implementation arrangements to implementing agencies, including regional and woreda administrations in conflict and drought-affected areas, has caused delays in providing accurate information on operation progress.
evidence_quote: Capacity gaps, in the Project Coordination Unit (PCU), along with a lack of clarity and communication regarding implementation arrangements to implementing agencies, including regional and woreda administrations, have caused delays in providing accurate and up-to-date information on the Operation's progress.

risk_title: Data Gaps on Refugee and Conflict-Affected Populations
risk_summary: Inconsistent reporting of results framework indicators due to lack of information on refugee populations and data from conflict-affected regions (Amhara and Tigray) is hindering measurement of progress in FCV-affected areas.
evidence_quote: inconsistent reporting of results framework indicators, largely due to data quality and availability issues (e.g., lack of information on Amhara and Tigray regions and reporting on refugees), is also hindering the measurement of progress.

risk_title: Capacity Constraints in Implementing Agencies Across FCV-Affected Levels
risk_summary: Capacity gaps in the PCU and implementing agencies at federal, regional, and woreda levels in conflict and drought-affected areas are limiting coordination and implementation of activities targeting vulnerable populations.
evidence_quote: These challenges are linked to capacity limitations at the PCU... The Mission team is concerned about the capacity gap in E&S management... Critical positions in the PCU need to be filled to improve implementation capacity.
